name: Arty

Arty is an Ignemikhal and Goultard's best friendGoultard.

He was born from a dofus that Crail had stolen from the Dark Vlad. As they are born, dragons take the form of the first creature they see. So when Arty was born and saw Crail, he took the form of a baby a fetal.

Crail raised him by hiding his true nature, which he only discovered when he died, when ManyManyanah wielded Crail's head like a puppet.

Seeing this, Arty turned into a dragon and reduced Bonta to ashes, then Brâkmar before spraying Many. Realizing that he had killed thousands of innocent people, he vowed to devote his life to the property. Fortunately, Bonta's destruction will be reversed by rewinding Xelor, following Minuit's interventionMinuit.

After the liberation of Cornu Mollu and its crushing defeat in the face of the evil deity, Arty went in search of the dofus with his friends in an attempt to save the World of the Twelve.
